ramp.xds: All Setup Options

Source: R/xds_help_setup_options.R
xds_help_setup_options.Rd

Basic Setup uses xds_setup or one of its variants (see xds_help_basic_setup) to create an xds object.

The following is a list of configurable options and where to look for more help.

Structural Parameters

  • nPatches – see patch_dynamics

  • nStrata – see human_populations

  • nHabitats – see aquatic_habitats

Modules

  • Xname – see XH_module_list

  • MYname– see MY_module_list

  • Lname – see L_module_list

Parameter values and initial values for the variables are passed as named lists. The module help pages have information about how to configure: Xoptions, MYoptions, & Loptions.

Basic options

  • Koptions see mosquito_dispersal and setup_K_matrix

  • search_weights

  • time_spent

Blood Feeding and Transmission

  • available_blood_hosts

    • blood_search_weights

    • other_blood_hosts

    • blood_traps

  • local_frac

Exposure

  • environmental_heterogeneity

  • travel_malaria

Malaria Importation

  • time_spent_here

  • travel_malaria

Mosquito Bionomics

xds_info_mosquito_bionomics

Forcing

xds_forcing trivial_forcing xds_junction_forcing

Resources

xds_junction_resources

Habitats and Egg Laying

  • bad_habitats

  • ovitraps
